name: Micron.js
description: Data-attribute driven micro-interaction library — jelly, bounce, shake, shrink, fade and more on click/hover. Zero JS needed in HTML, just add data-micron='jelly' to any element.
head:
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/webkul-micron@1.1.6/dist/css/micron.min.css">
<script src="https://unpkg.com/webkul-micron@1.1.6/dist/js/micron.min.js"></script>
body:
<script>
// Micron.js is data-attribute driven — add these to your HTML elements:
// data-micron="jelly"    — wobbly jelly press effect on click
// data-micron="bounce"  — bounce on click
// data-micron="shake"   — shake (good for error states)
// data-micron="tada"    — celebratory tada
// data-micron="swing"   — swing effect
// data-micron="pulse"   — pulse on click
// Optional: data-micron-duration="0.9" data-micron-timing="ease-in-out"

// Auto-apply jelly to all primary buttons that don't already have data-micron
(function() {
  if (typeof micron === 'undefined') return;
  document.querySelectorAll('.btn--primary, .btn-primary').forEach(function(el) {
    if (!el.getAttribute('data-micron')) {
      el.setAttribute('data-micron', 'jelly');
      el.setAttribute('data-micron-duration', '0.7');
    }
  });
})();
</script>
